items.quote: "Such a friendly bunch, know what they're doing. Did such a good job on my roof so I referred them to my friend who had issues with hers. She said the same! Top quality service. Top quality roofing."
items.name: Lindsay Funston

items.quote: "Was advised to use this roofing contractors by my friend who was booked up on the day. Usually only use people I know as tradesman have a reputation for being unreliable. This company was amazing!! Very prompt, reliable and efficient. Thank you for my new roof. Wouldn't go anywhere else for my roofing needs."
items.name: Michael Clegg

items.quote: "The guys that came round really made my day. After stressing about my gutter being blocked, they came round and fixed it within minutes. Their sense of humour was 5 star. Would pay to watch them at a comedy club too haha.. double whammy"
items.name: Linda Collin
